description: Claim has only indirect literature evidence (no direct study on subject device). Conclusion strength must be limited or moderate, NOT strong.

input.ifu_text: Device reduces procedure time compared to standard care.

available_evidence.findings: Pooled analysis shows closure devices reduce procedure time by 15-25% vs manual compression.
Mean procedure time 12.4 min vs 18.2 min for manual.

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: Two indirect studies support the claim; no direct study on subject device. Indirect evidence with consistent direction → moderate at best.

writer_must_include: no direct study on subject device
